headline: U.S. FDA Accepts Gilead’s Application for Investigational Once-Weekly Oral Yeztugo, Potentially the First Long-Acting Pill for HIV Prevention
summary: FOSTER CITY, Calif., June 15, 2026--Gilead Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: GILD) today announced the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) accepted its supplemental New Drug Application (sNDA) for Yeztugo® (lenacapavir) 300-mg tablet as a potential once-weekly (QW) oral formulation for the prevention of HIV as pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP). The FDA has assigned a Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) action date of February 2, 2027.

headline: Gilead’s New Liver Approvals Reframe PBC Goals And Revenue Mix
summary: Gilead Sciences (NasdaqGS:GILD) reported positive Phase 3 IDEAL trial results for Livdelzi in primary biliary cholangitis (PBC), supporting alkaline phosphatase (ALP) normalization as a treatment goal. The US Food and Drug Administration granted accelerated approval for Livdelzi in PBC. The FDA also approved Hepcludex for the treatment of hepatitis delta virus infection. Gilead Sciences, known for its focus on antiviral and liver disease treatments, is adding fresh momentum to its liver...
